# chronosphere_team (Resource)

A named group of users that can own collections, buckets, and other resources. Teams scope access control and serve as the ownership unit for resources across the platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "chronosphere_team" "platform" {
  name        = "Platform"
  description = "Platform engineering team"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Display name of the team. Can be changed after creation.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Free-form description of the team.
- `slug` (String) Stable identifier for the team. Generated from `name` if omitted. Immutable after creation.
- `user_emails` (Set of String) Unordered set of email addresses identifying the users who are members of this team.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
